encounter.discharge_destination: Usual place of residence with safety-net advice

encounter_summary: Acute appendicitis: A 24-hour history of central abdominal pain migrating to the right iliac fossa, anorexia and nausea. Emergency appendicectomy following antibiotics, analgesia and shared consent. Mobilising, tolerating diet and discharged with safety-net advice.

passages.text: A 24-hour history of central abdominal pain migrating to the right iliac fossa, anorexia and nausea.
Focal right iliac fossa tenderness with guarding; NEWS2 remains low risk.
Clinical impression: Acute appendicitis without peritonitis.
Raised inflammatory markers and ultrasound appearances consistent with uncomplicated acute appendicitis.
Procedure completed: Emergency appendicectomy. No immediate complication documented.
Emergency appendicectomy following antibiotics, analgesia and shared consent.
Mobilising, tolerating diet and discharged with safety-net advice.
Synthetic record only. Review trigger reference 328; not for patient care.

codes.rationale: The episode documentation supports K35.8 (Acute appendicitis, other and unspecified).
The documented procedure supports H01.1 (Emergency excision of abnormal appendix).
